title: Internal MVP one-command launch script v0
problem: Operators must stitch README steps manually to refresh mock product proof and start the Atlas preview dev server. A single Windows launcher reduces friction for internal MVP demos.
acceptance_criteria: Script runs prove-researcher-product with scratch work dir and prints product_verdict.
Script prints default research prompt and starts public-site dev server on localhost:3000.
Script prints http://localhost:3000/atlas-preview and does not start port 8000.
README includes One-command internal MVP launch section pointing to the script.
test_plan: Run ./scripts/launch_internal_mvp.ps1 and confirm product_verdict GO or clear failure.
rollback_plan: Delete launch script and revert README launch section.
